title: Sword Hero Dual Composition Movie Poster AI
sourceTitle: Sword Hero Dual Composition Movie Poster AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Cinematic dual-composition sword-hero poster for adult wandering swordswoman in misty bamboo bridge at dawn, built around a cliff-back-view and half-face closeup structure. Subject: adult wandering swordswoman appears twice in one coherent poster: a full back-view figure holding long straight sword with rain beads on the left-side cliff scene, and a severe right-side half-face closeup watching the world below. Scene: Dusk martial-arts world with a lonely peak, distant town lights, smoke from low houses, layered rooftops or landscape forms from misty bamboo bridge at dawn, and a restrained human-world glow beneath the hero. Composition: Fixed vertical movie-poster split composition: left side shows the hero from behind on a high cliff above the city, hand pressing the weapon hilt as if about to draw; right side occupies about forty percent of the frame with an extreme half-face closeup divided from forehead to chin, one cold eye, hard cheekbone, rim-lit profile, and the world below reflected in mood. Signature Elements: adult wandering swordswoman, misty bamboo bridge at dawn, long straight sword with rain beads, cliff-top back view, right-side half-face closeup, cold single eye, tiny city lights, warm rim light, silent draw-before-action tension, and vertical title 一鞘横安万盏灯. Style: High-end wuxia cinematic poster with solemn emotional restraint, heroic loneliness, precise anatomical tension, painterly realism, disciplined negative space, and premium film-key-art finish. Color Palette: Dusk blue-gray and smoke brown base, thin warm-gold sunset rim light, dim city-lamp amber, deep black costume masses, cold skin shadows, and restrained ink-like contrast. Lighting: Low sunset backlight gilds the shoulder, weapon edge, and facial rim while keeping the face emotionally cold; city lights glow faintly below without overpowering the hero silhouette. Camera: Poster-grade composite camera language: wide distant back-view scene paired with extreme cropped face closeup, both aligned by the same horizon and dusk light direction. Typography: 一鞘横安万盏灯 appears as a vertical ten-character-style Wei-bei inscription in one poster corner, clear, complete, and secondary to the dual portrait composition. Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。

Scene: Dusk martial-arts world with a lonely peak, distant town lights, smoke from low houses, layered rooftops or landscape forms from frozen lake under pale moon, and a restrained human-world glow beneath the hero. Composition: Fixed vertical movie-poster split composition: left side shows the hero from behind on a high cliff above the city, hand pressing the weapon hilt as if about to draw; right side occupies about forty percent of the frame with an extreme half-face closeup divided from forehead to chin, one cold eye, hard cheekbone, rim-lit profile, and the world below reflected in mood. Signature Elements: adult snowfield guardian, frozen lake under pale moon, silver sword and broken scabbard, cliff-top back view, right-side half-face closeup, cold single eye, tiny city lights, warm rim light, silent draw-before-action tension, and vertical title 霜湖照影万山空. Style: High-end wuxia cinematic poster with solemn emotional restraint, heroic loneliness, precise anatomical tension, painterly realism, disciplined negative space, and premium film-key-art finish. Color Palette: Dusk blue-gray and smoke brown base, thin warm-gold sunset rim light, dim city-lamp amber, deep black costume masses, cold skin shadows, and restrained ink-like contrast. Lighting: Low sunset backlight gilds the shoulder, weapon edge, and facial rim while keeping the face emotionally cold; city lights glow faintly below without overpowering the hero silhouette. Camera: Poster-grade composite camera language: wide distant back-view scene paired with extreme cropped face closeup, both aligned by the same horizon and dusk light direction. Typography: 霜湖照影万山空 appears as a vertical ten-character-style Wei-bei inscription in one poster corner, clear, complete, and secondary to the dual portrait composition. Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.

Style: High-end wuxia cinematic poster with solemn emotional restraint, heroic loneliness, precise anatomical tension, painterly realism, disciplined negative space, and premium film-key-art finish. Color Palette: Dusk blue-gray and smoke brown base, thin warm-gold sunset rim light, dim city-lamp amber, deep black costume masses, cold skin shadows, and restrained ink-like contrast. Lighting: Low sunset backlight gilds the shoulder, weapon edge, and facial rim while keeping the face emotionally cold; city lights glow faintly below without overpowering the hero silhouette. Camera: Poster-grade composite camera language: wide distant back-view scene paired with extreme cropped face closeup, both aligned by the same horizon and dusk light direction. Typography: 一鞘横安万盏灯 appears as a vertical ten-character-style Wei-bei inscription in one poster corner, clear, complete, and secondary to the dual portrait composition. Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.
